name: Sunshine Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 oz packages frozen whole kernel corn, cooked and drained
2 cups grated sharp cheese (preferably New York Cheddar)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Sauté onion in butter in a large skillet until onions are translucent.
3. Add sliced squash to the skillet and steam until tender, about 5 minutes.
4. Drain any excess liquid from the squash, then add seasonings (garlic salt, cumin, salt, pepper) and cooked corn.
5. Cover and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
6. Stir in grated cheese and pour mixture into a 1½ quart baking dish.
7. Top with seasoned buttered bread crumbs.
8. Bake uncovered at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and bubbly.
